{{CargoOrgan
|name=Super Cell
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10933
|idx=33
|description="After the experimental cells became super-conductive, the speed of nerve signals increased, and a strong magnetic field was formed. You can expect this organ to boost the transplantee's abilities"
—Unknown Researcher Notes
|skill=
|hp=910
|def=95
|atk=120
|rush=112
|gene1=In Gene Sims, {race} RUSH +20
|gene2=In Gene Sims, {race} ATK +20
|gene3=In Gene Sims, RUSH DMG +5%
|gene7=In Gene Sims, DMG +3% (Awakened)
|}}
